01.name: BAU-filters-01
01.description: Complete Filters module — Project Hub + Product Hub. 6 screens designed, ADS tokens probed, JQL architecture specced, 10 outliers defined.

02.name: BAU-story-description-01
02.description: Build new Tiptap-based Description editor to replace ~2MB Atlaskit editor. Mount on Story ticket type only in v1. Reuse useCatyImprove + CatyStreamingOverlay + ph_issues.description_adf storage. 15-button bubble toolbar, @ / : / / inline triggers, View More modal with 5 tabs (4 show 'Coming soon' in v1). History disabled in v1 (no revisions table). PO approval gate before making canonical.
